summary: Completed testing of Iteration 103 features: Push Notification System and Stress Testing Dashboard. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: Both dashboards working correctly with all tabs and features functional.

issues: WebSocket connection shows warning in console but reconnects automatically - expected behavior for preview environment

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration103_push_stress.py - Created comprehensive test suite for push notifications and stress testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push Notification System and Stress Testing features are fully functional. Notification Center page at /notification-center has 4 tabs (Notifications, Preferences, Devices, Status). Stress Test Dashboard at /stress-test has 4 tabs (Run Test, Results, History, Quick Tests). System shows estimated capacity of ~11,396 concurrent users limited by memory. MOCKED: Platform integrations, Twilio SMS, SendGrid Email, Firebase FCM, Web Push are all in mock mode.

push_notification_system.GET /api/push/status: PASS - Returns operational status with services (in_app: ready, web_push: mock_mode, fcm: mock_mode, websocket: ready)
push_notification_system.GET /api/push/notifications/{user_id}: PASS - Returns user notifications with unread count
push_notification_system.GET /api/push/preferences/{user_id}: PASS - Returns default preferences for new users
push_notification_system.PUT /api/push/notifications/{user_id}/re: PASS - Marks all notifications as read
push_notification_system.POST /api/push/test/send-all: PASS - Sends test notification through all channels

stress_testing_system.GET /api/stress-test/system/metrics: PASS - Returns CPU (2.4%), Memory (28.9%), Disk (24%) metrics
stress_testing_system.GET /api/stress-test/system/capacity-est: PASS - Returns estimated capacity (11,396 users, limited by Memory)

frontend_notification_center.four_tabs: PASS - Notifications, Preferences, Devices, Status tabs present
frontend_notification_center.notification_list: PASS - Shows 28 notification items with priority badges
frontend_notification_center.action_buttons: PASS - Test, Seed Demo, Mark All Read, Clear All buttons visible
frontend_notification_center.filter_dropdowns: PASS - Filter by type and category dropdowns working
frontend_notification_center.preferences_tab: PASS - 14 preference switches for channels and categories
frontend_notification_center.status_tab: PASS - Shows service status cards with statistics (1081 total, 1055 unread)

frontend_stress_test_dashboard.system_metrics: PASS - CPU, Memory, Disk, Est. Capacity cards visible
frontend_stress_test_dashboard.four_tabs: PASS - Run Test, Results, History, Quick Tests tabs present
frontend_stress_test_dashboard.test_configuration: PASS - Sliders for concurrent users (10-20,000), duration, ramp-up time
frontend_stress_test_dashboard.quick_tests: PASS - Light (100), Medium (1,000), Heavy (5,000), Extreme (20,000) presets
frontend_stress_test_dashboard.notification_flood: PASS - Run Flood Test button for 10,000 notifications
